title: The Basrans' Allegiance to 'Ali and His Division of the Contents of the Treasury among Them
description: of the Contents of the Treasury among Them According to al-Sari (in writing)-Shu'ayb-Sayf-Muhammad and Talhah: Al-Ahnaf gave allegiance in the evening because he had been absent, he and Banu Sa'd. Then they all entered alBasrah, and the Basrans gave allegiance under their banners. `Ali gave allegiance to the Basrans, even the wounded and those who had sought protection. But when Marwan returned [to Medi-

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 16
